non_blocking_notes: Full build, Vitest, and Playwright E2E were not run because this review is read-only and those tools write build/cache artifacts. Gate 5 still needs the required writable npm run test:e2e run.
No secrets were found in the diff scan. Matches were env-var names or test dummy values.
The checked-out .codex/audits/join-form-compliance.review.json is from a prior failed round; this verdict should replace it as the current Gate 4 artifact in the orchestrator output.

spec_compliance.evidence: src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:395-421 renders label "Gender" with exactly Female and Male radios, and the initial state at src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:77-84 preselects Female.

spec_compliance.criterion: 2. First name + Last name validation and title case
spec_compliance.evidence: src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:278-304 renders split required inputs; convex/lib/names.ts:26-55 validates Latin name parts and rejects sentence-shaped input; convex/lib/names.ts:95-105 applies name-aware title case before storage.

spec_compliance.criterion: 3. Email normalization, disposable rejection, duplicate route
spec_compliance.evidence: convex/lib/joinValidation.ts:24-33 trims/lowercases and rejects listed disposable domains; convex/members.ts:394-403 returns sign_in before insert on duplicate; src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:223-230 avoids automatic email send for already=true.

spec_compliance.criterion: 4. Country fixed select stored to country_of_residence
spec_compliance.evidence: src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:322-340 renders COUNTRIES; convex/members.ts:296-298 validates it; convex/members.ts:424 stores country_of_residence.
src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:446-474 uses LOOKING_FOR; convex/lib/joinValidation.ts:57-60 validates values and duplicates; convex/members.ts:425 stores looking_for.

convex/members.ts:306-323 rejects invalid/under-13 and requires guardian fields for minors; convex/members.ts:430-454 creates pending guardianConsents and audits it; convex/auth.ts:139-145 moves minors to pending_guardian after email verification.
src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:504-516 renders the required sentence, and convex/members.ts:282-286 rejects missing attestation server-side.
src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:164-244 displays "Your certificate will read" with the title-cased fullName, calls submitJoin only from that confirmation stage, and provides an Edit path back to the form.

spec_compliance.criterion: 9. Consent lines and explicit false rows
spec_compliance.evidence: src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:492-543 keeps terms required and marketing/pipeline off by default; convex/members.ts:477-479 writes all three consent rows, forcing pipeline false for non-standard lanes at convex/members.ts:465-476.

convex/members.ts:276-280 silently drops filled honeypot submissions before side effects; convex/members.ts:325-348 verifies Turnstile before rate-limit consumption and enforces per-email/global join caps; boundary validators cover stored join fields.
Targeted rg found no U+2014/U+2013 in src/portal/*.tsx; edited Arabic page-title/Leadership/event strings use regular hyphens, with only the documented Arabic org-name en dash exception remaining.
src/components/membership/HowToJoin.astro:33-36 uses an Astro comment that does not ship as built HTML, and the former HTML [CONFIRM] comment is gone.
SOURCE-MAP.md:15-23 adds rows for /join, /portal, /verify, and the six Arabic routes.

tests/unit/names.test.ts, tests/unit/joinValidation.test.ts, tests/unit/rateLimit.test.ts, tests/convex/joinSafeguards.test.ts, and tests/e2e/join-form.spec.ts cover the specified validation, rate, safeguarding, and rendered-shell cases.

The diff is limited to join-form compliance, minor/profile safeguards directly supporting that flow, brand string cleanup, source-map/spec/audit artifacts, and tests; no extra product feature surface was introduced.

summary: No ship-blocking authorization, safeguarding, validation, secrets, data-leakage, audit-trail, brand-lock, or spec-compliance issue remains in the reviewed code diff. Gate 5 still needs to run the full E2E/build suite in a writable environment.
